auth.telegram_required: Open this app from Telegram to sign in.
auth.login_hint: Enter your phone and password to continue.
auth.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.forgot_hint: Enter your phone — we'll send a code to your Telegram.
auth.change_password_hint: Enter your current password to confirm.
auth.share_phone_denied: Phone not shared. Please try again.
auth.otp_hint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your Telegram.
auth.no_telegram: Open this app from Telegram to receive the code.
auth.otp_throttled: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
auth.err_phone_taken: This phone is already registered. Please log in.
auth.err_otp_required: Verification code is required. Check your Telegram.
auth.err_otp_max_attempts: Too many wrong attempts. Request a new code.
auth.err_account_disabled: Your account is disabled. Please contact the administrator.

catalogue.title: Rooms
catalogue.subtitle: Browse available rooms across all branches.
catalogue.empty: No rooms match these filters yet.

room_extra.unavailable: This room is not available right now.

booking.title: Book this room
booking.no_refund_notice: Payments are non-refundable. Please double-check your dates before paying.
booking.reservation_expired: Reservation time is up. Start again to continue.
booking.cancel_warning: Cancellation is final. The amount you paid will not be refunded.
booking.no_bookings: You haven't booked any rooms yet.
booking.error_overlap: These dates were just booked. Please pick another room or different dates.
booking.error_held: Someone else is currently checking out this room. Try again in a few minutes or pick another room.
booking.error_room_unavailable: This room is not available right now.
booking.error_past: Check-in date is in the past.
booking.error_short: Pick at least one full night.
booking.error_too_far: Check-in date is too far in the future.
booking.error_not_active: Only paid bookings can be modified.

payment.title: Payment
payment.still_processing: Still processing — we’ll show your booking once confirmed.
payment.success: Payment received — your booking is confirmed.
payment.failed: Payment failed. Try again or contact reception.
payment.hold_expired_body: Your 5-minute hold ended. The room is back in the catalogue — please pick dates again.
payment.demo_notice: Demo mode: Stripe is not configured. Click Pay to simulate a successful payment.

extend.title: Extend your stay
extend.only_paid: Only paid bookings can be extended.

chat.rate_limited: Slow down — please wait a moment.
chat.daily_cap: You've reached today's chat limit. Try again tomorrow.

validation.invalid_name: Letters only, no spaces or symbols.
validation.invalid_phone: Phone must start with +998 and have 9 more digits.
validation.invalid_passport: Passport must be 2 letters + 7 digits, e.g. AB1234567.
validation.date_in_past: Date cannot be in the past.
validation.dob_in_future: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
validation.min_age: You must be at least {{min}} years old.
validation.password_min: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
validation.weak_password: Password must contain letters and digits.
validation.min_nights: Stay must be at least {{min}} day(s).
validation.range_inverted: Minimum cannot be greater than maximum.
